cases.prompt: Replace the port numbers in my local dev setup with stable named .localhost URLs.
cases.expected_behavior: Maps ports to stable local hostnames and updates the configuration.

cases.prompt: I want local services accessible through friendly hostnames instead of raw ports.
cases.expected_behavior: Sets up portless local access using named URLs.

cases.prompt: Deploy the app to the internet.
cases.expected_behavior: This is deployment, not local port mapping.

cases.prompt: I have several local services on random ports and keep forgetting them; give them stable names.
cases.expected_behavior: Creates a predictable local naming scheme for ports.
